name: Suspicious Atbroker Registry Change Detected
description: Detects the creation or modification of Assistive Technology (AT) registry values, which can be abused by adversaries for persistence.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the registry value set event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Registry Value Set (13).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the registry modification occurred.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that modified the registry key.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the process that modified the registry key.

parameters.name: registry_key
parameters.description: The full path of the modified registry key within the Accessibility ATs or Configuration hive.

parameters.name: registry_value
parameters.description: The new data or value that was written to the registry key.
